data.note: MOCK RUN — fake AgentCore control+data clients; ZERO AWS/network/compute. Proves the CreateAgentRuntime(A2A,PUBLIC)->READY->InvokeAgentRuntime(message/send)->assert 200+jsonrpc->delete contract deterministically. The real one-off end-to-end capture is evidence/live_a2a_runtime_result.json.

Runtime A2A lifecycle: CreateAgentRuntime(protocol=A2A, network=PUBLIC) from an ECR image -> poll to READY -> InvokeAgentRuntime(A2A message/send) -> assert HTTP 200 + JSON-RPC result -> ALWAYS DeleteAgentRuntime (teardown). MOCK RUN — fake AgentCore control+data clients; ZERO AWS/network/compute. Proves the CreateAgentRuntime(A2A,PUBLIC)->READY->InvokeAgentRuntime(message/send)->assert 200+jsonrpc->delete contract deterministically. The real one-off end-to-end capture is evidence/live_a2a_runtime_result.json.
